title: A new student
explanation:
A new student

Read the text.

Today a new student came to our class. Her name is Yuki and she is from Japan. She is sixteen years old. She speaks English very well. She likes music and basketball. After school she wants to visit the city centre with us. We are happy to meet her.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Yuki speaks English very ____. | *well | bad | slow
She wants to visit the city ____. | *centre | school | Japan
A new student came to our ____. | *class | shop | town
We are happy to ____ her. | *meet | leave | forget

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: After school she wants to go out with [*classmates|teachers|doctors].
The text is about a [*new student|holiday|supermarket].
